[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011101 4
1 0000010101 3
2 0101001010 4
3 0010111001 5
4 1010101010 5
5 1111001010 6
6 1110000010 4
7 1010100001 4

01 10 0000100000 1
12 21 1111000010 5
23 32 1010000000 2
34 43 1000100001 3
45 54 1000010101 4
56 65 0000000010 1
67 76 0001001000 2
70 07 0000011000 2

02 20 0000001000 1
13 31 1010100000 3
24 42 1101001000 4
35 53 1010000001 3
46 64 0101101000 4
57 75 1010010000 3
60 06 0000101000 2
71 17 1011000000 3

03 30 0000100001 2
14 41 1101100000 4
25 52 1010000010 3
36 63 0000100000 1
47 74 1001011000 4
50 05 0000010001 2
61 16 0101100010 4
72 27 1011001000 4

04 40 0000111001 4
15 51 1010000010 3
26 62 0101001010 4 match 2
37 73 1010000000 2
[completion]
